title: مرسوم بقانون رقم (5) لسنة 2000 بشأن الاعتمادات الاضافية والمناقلات والحساب الختامي للشئون المالية للدولة عن السنة المالية 1999
title_en: Decree No. (2) of 2000 ratifying the Convention Between the Government of The State of Bahrain and the Government of the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan for the Avoidance of Double Taxation and the Prevention of Fiscal Evasion with respect to Taxes on Income and on Capital
